NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO DISMISS FOR FORUM NON CONVENIENS; MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES (TRANSACTION ID # 77983964) FILED BY DEFENDANT UTAVI, INC. HEARING SET FOR JAN-13-2026 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT UTAVI, INC.'S MOTION TO DISMISS FOR FORUM NON CONVENIENS IS GRANTED. THE CASE IS DISMISSED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND GOOD CAUSE SHOWN BY UTAVI DUE TO THE FORUM SELECTION CLAUSE IN THE PARTIES' CONTRACT. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. VISITING JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (301/HEK)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2026 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Forum Non Conveniens; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Jan-13-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT UTAVI, INC.'S Motion To Dismiss For Forum Non Conveniens

Defendant Utavi, Inc.'s motion to dismiss for forum non conveniens is granted. The case is dismissed. No opposition filed and good cause shown by Utavi due to the forum selection clause in the parties' contract.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2025 Continued To Mar-11-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
